_doc: Tracks the last point at which we audited the team-app repo for changes that could affect the customer-portal. Updated automatically by the sync workflow.
notes: Stock-change actor attribution shipped. warehouse_movements gained created_by_user_id (FK users) + created_by_contact_id (FK contacts). New helper public._resolve_actor(p_explicit_user_id) returns (user_id, contact_id, display_name) from JWT context. All stock-mutating paths now populate the actor: log_warehouse_request_reservation (INSERT + new DELETE branch), _trg_request_status_settles_stock (cancel + fulfill audit rows), _trg_outbound_cancelled_restores_stock, create_outbound_shipment (both overloads, optional p_user_id param), create_inbound_shipment (optional p_user_id), mark_inbound_delivered (optional p_user_id). New view public.warehouse_movements_client adds actor_display_name + actor_role ('team'/'customer'/'system'). Customer portal's WarehousePage now shows 'by <name>' with a coloured team/customer pill on each movement row in both Inventory Detail and the standalone Movements tab. TEAM-APP CODE ACTION (optional but recommended): pass p_user_id when calling the RPCs server-side from contexts where auth.uid() isn't reliable; otherwise everything Just Works because the triggers + RPCs read auth.uid() automatically.
